rationale: Accuses a named politician (Moses Kuria) of inciting residents - criticism of an individual's conduct, not of an ethnic group.

label: hate

label: hate

label: neither
rationale: Maasai voters stating they will block/stay - electoral bloc assertion, no contempt or attack on any group.

rationale: A sympathetic remark about the Luo community's political heritage ('one father, rip jakom'), no attack or contempt.
